ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.title: [Persona: Steamed Egg]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.descript: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Trouble Maker[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.flavor: It always finds the perfect beat for the worst possible idea.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SAMURAI_PRAWN.desc: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Famous Blade[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. The first time each turn you attack an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Sword Aura[/power]. The first [blue]2[/blue] stacks each make your attacks deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage. The [blue]3[/blue]rd stack makes your attacks deal [blue]2[/blue] extra damage. Maximum [blue]3[/blue] stacks.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SAMURAI_PRAWN.flav: A single slash settles the stance. The third slash settles the battle.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SLIME_LULU.title: [Persona: Slime Lulu]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SLIME_LULU.descrip: Lose [blue]10[/blue] Max HP. When taking damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Half Life Heal[/power] and reduce this effect's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Healing Slime[/card] to your hand.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BIONIC_JASMINE.des: Gain [gold]Steps[/gold] when entering rooms. At combat start, lose [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity. Every [blue]13[/blue] steps gained grants [blue]1[/blue] Strength/Dexterity (alternating). Lose combat-gained Strength/Dexterity after combat ends.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS.title: [Persona: Proprietress]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS.descr: When entering a shop, gain gold equal to [blue]10[/blue] times the number of shops you have entered this run. While any player has this relic, every player's shop cards, potions, relics, and card removal service each have a [blue]3[/blue]% chance to cost only [blue]30[/blue]% of their normal price. This chance increases by [blue]3[/blue]% each time you pass through a shop. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, trigger this relic's combat effect.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS.flavo: Business is business. Bargains are personal.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MOUSY_LIAN.title: [Persona: Mousy Lian]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MOUSY_LIAN.descrip: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Mousy Save Me[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MOUSY_LIAN.flavor: A tiny rescue can still change the whole fight.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BLUE_WHALE.title: [Persona: Blue Whale]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BLUE_WHALE.descrip: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Weak Imprint[/card] to your hand. Defeating an enemy with [power]Weak Imprint[/power] gives you [blue]3[/blue] Gold. If combat ends exactly on turn [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]6[/blue] Gold. Each later repeat adds [blue]2[/blue] more Gold to that reward. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BLUE_WHALE.flavor: The future has already been decided!
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MASCOT_GIRL_MIMI.d: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Product Restocking[/card] to your hand. Whenever [card]Product Restocking[/card] discards a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_MASCOT_GIRL_MIMI.f: A full shelf is nice. A refilled hand is better.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_OASIS_QUEEN.title: [Persona: Oasis Queen]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_OASIS_QUEEN.descri: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Royal Prerogative[/card] to your hand. Deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage for each [gold]Temporary[/gold] card in your hand, up to [blue]3[/blue]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_OASIS_QUEEN.flavor: What stays, what goes, and what shines all answer to the queen.
At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Shadow Fusion[/card] to your hand. At the start of your turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to a random enemy. Whenever you play an Attack card that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} to {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} targeting an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to that target, up to your current [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit each turn. Entering an Elite room gives you [blue]1[/blue] [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. Entering a Boss room gives you [blue]3[/blue] [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. At the end of that combat, each stack of [power]Hunter's Feast[/power] permanently increases your [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit by [blue]1[/blue]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
A small shadow is still enough to leave a mark.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSONALITY_DERIVATIVE_PR: Every [blue]2[/blue] rooms, gain Gold equal to this relic's counter. [card]Transfer[/card] increases that counter by [blue]1[/blue]. This counter has no cap.
Money likes finding its way back with friends.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_PROPRIETRESS_WEALT: Every [blue]2[/blue] rooms, gain Gold equal to this relic's counter. [card]Transfer[/card] increases that counter by [blue]1[/blue]. This counter has no cap.
Money likes finding its way back with friends.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SUPERMAN_MEGAS.des: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Orbital Bombardment[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. At turn end, if you have fewer than [blue]5[/blue] cards in hand, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card next turn. After playing [card]Orbital Bombardment[/card], draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SUPERMAN_MEGAS.fla: Less in hand. More from orbit.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_XIAO_LEI.title: [Persona: Xiao Lei]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_XIAO_LEI.descripti: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Chain Reaction[/card] to your hand. Whenever you cause another player to gain a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. After enduring Seventy-Two Heavenly Thunders and Thirty-Six Heavenly Fires, unlock [power]True Dragon Form[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_XIAO_LEI.flavor: No dragon crosses the gate before surviving the storm.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSONALITY_DERIVATIVE_XI: At the end of combat, reduce Seventy-Two Heavenly Thunders by your [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. Whenever you take damage, reduce Thirty-Six Heavenly Fires by [blue]1[/blue]. Once both trials reach [blue]0[/blue], at the start of each combat gain [power]True Dragon Form[/power] and add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Dragon's Roar[/card] to your hand.
The gate yields only after thunder and fire have both been spent.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSONALITY_DERIVATIVE_SW: Starts at [blue]0[/blue] and does not grow on its own. Every [blue]2[/blue] total [power]Sword Aura[/power] consumed by [card]Famous Blade[/card] increases this relic's counter by [blue]1[/blue]. Each time you play [card]Famous Blade[/card], deal bonus damage to the target equal to this relic's counter.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_JILL_STEINLE.title: [Persona: Bartender]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_JILL_STEINLE.descr: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Mixed Cocktails[/card] to your hand. If [card]Mixed Cocktails[/card] discards exactly [blue]3[/blue] cards with all different types, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. If it discards exactly [blue]3[/blue] cards of the same type, the target gains [blue]3[/blue] extra [green]Dexterity[/green].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SHADOW_SCION.title: [Persona: Al]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SHADOW_SCION.descr:
The first combat after obtaining this relic, all players gain [blue]50[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. This happens only once.
At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Powerful Pity[/card] to your hand.
Whenever any player gains a card or draws a card, you and that player each gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
At combat start, for every [blue]12[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold] you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SHADOW_SCION.flavo: The strong may show mercy. The shadow only remembers the price.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SOCIAL_FEAR_NUN.de: At the start of every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Iron Virgin[/card] to your hand. At the start of each turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Boundary Reinforcement[/power].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE4.title: Blue d[blue]4[/blue]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE4.descripti:
If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]4[/blue], gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE6.title: Blue d[blue]6[/blue]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE6.descripti:
If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and draw [blue]3[/blue] extra cards at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE6.flavor: A simple roll with a tidy payout.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE8.title: Blue d[blue]8[/blue]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE8.descripti:
If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]8[/blue], gain [blue]8[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to all enemies at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE10.title: Blue d[blue]10[/blue]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE10.descript:
If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]10[/blue], gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and [blue]7[/blue] Block at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE10.flavor: Wait for ten. Cash out clean.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE12.title: Blue d[blue]12[/blue]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE12.descript:
If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]12[/blue], gain [blue]12[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and heal [blue]9[/blue] HP at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE12.flavor: A longer odds curve with a brighter finish.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE20.title: Blue d[blue]20[/blue]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_DIE20.descript:
If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]20[/blue], gain [blue]20[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and all start-of-next-combat effects from the other dice at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_BANK_CARD_GENE: Gain [blue]14[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you do not have [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], obtain it first, then add the stacks.
Not much at once. Plenty if you keep going.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_MEMBERS_REFERE: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card.
Even a standard membership looks better with a proper introduction.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_ETERNAL_STARLIGHT.c: · No set effect is currently active.
[gold]· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]10[/blue], gain [blue]5[/blue] Gold when you enter a shop[/gold]
[gold]· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]25[/blue], gain [blue]15[/blue] Gold when you enter a shop[/gold]
[gold]· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]40[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold when you enter a shop[/gold]
[gold]· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]56[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold and immediately obtain Membership Card when you enter a shop[/gold]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_ETERNAL_STARLIGHT.f: It never burns out. It only accumulates.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_MOTORCYCLE_HEL:
At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Phantom Reverse Scales[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] Block.
Secure the helmet first. Worry about speed later.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_PIGGY_BANK.fla: Bank the effort first. Cash out the sparkle later.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_SANDWICH_BISCU: A simple bite with surprisingly lasting mileage.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_BANK_CARD_PREM: Gain [blue]14[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. At combat start, all players gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
One swipe, and everyone glows a little brighter.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_EXPLORATION_SA:
Whenever you play a Star Engine effect card, which means any custom Skill card from this mod, add [blue]1[/blue] extra base-damage [gold]Orbital Bombardment[/gold]. This [gold]Orbital Bombardment[/gold] does not discard your hand.
At end of turn, if you have fewer than [blue]6[/blue] cards in hand, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Orbital Railgun[/gold] next turn.
From high orbit, every line of fire looks like a plan.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_MEMBERS_REFERE: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
A name on this letter opens more than one door.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_MOTORCYCLE_HEL:
At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Phantom Reverse Scales[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block.
Premium protection makes every line feel cleaner.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_STAR_COIN_HAMM: Gain [blue]15[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you have at least [blue]40[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold] and at least [blue]100[/blue] Gold, the first time each turn you deal damage, spend [blue]15[/blue] Gold and deal bonus damage to that target equal to [blue]10[/blue]% of your current Gold. If that bonus damage kills the target, gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
The heavier the purse, the harder the swing.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_BANK_CARD_IN: Gain [blue]28[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you do not have [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], obtain it first, then add the stacks.
A thicker balance makes the climb feel lighter.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_MEMBERS_REFE: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards.
A stronger endorsement makes the benefits arrive faster.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_MOTORCYCLE_H:
At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Phantom Reverse Scales[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] Block.
A steadier shell makes risk feel negotiable.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_SANDWICH_BIS: Gain [blue]15[/blue] Max HP. At the start of each turn, if your current HP is below [blue]50[/blue]% of your Max HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Counter[/gold].
Well fed, well braced, and ready to bite back.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_ADRENALINE_G: When your HP is below [blue]50[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. When it is below [blue]25[/blue]%, gain [blue]3[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red] instead.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_ADRENALINE_EFF: When your HP is below [blue]50[/blue]%, gain [blue]3[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. When it is below [blue]25[/blue]%, gain [blue]8[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red] instead.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_FLASHLIGHT_GEN:
Whenever you kill an enemy, heal [blue]4[/blue] HP.
This relic also grants the [gold]Flashlight Set[/gold] effect.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_FLASHLIGHT_S:
Every [blue]3[/blue] Attack cards you play that cost at least [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Flashlight Set[/gold] effect.
A brighter beam makes every hit feel confirmed.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_FLASHLIGHT_FLA:
Every [blue]3[/blue] Attack cards you play that cost at least [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
For every [blue]10[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], your Attack cards deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage.
This relic also grants the [gold]Flashlight Set[/gold] effect.
One burst to blind. One more to end it.
At the end of your turn, if you have fewer than [blue]5[/blue] cards in hand, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card next turn.
Whenever an enemy attacks you with an attack intent, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] and gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
Take the hit. Keep the margin.
At the end of your turn, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] and heal [blue]1[/blue] HP.
A full bowl can carry a whole team.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_MEDICAL_KIT_EM: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_MEDICAL_KIT_CO: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] stacks of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_FRIENDSHIP_B: Whenever you cause a teammate to gain [gold]StarLight[/gold] or [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold], both you and that target gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_ART_KNIFE_BE: While you are at full HP, gain [blue]2[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Your Attack cards deal extra damage equal to your [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] stacks.
Light in hand. Clean in cut.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_ART_KNIFE_SHAR: While you are at full HP, gain [blue]4[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Your Attack cards deal extra damage equal to your [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] stacks.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_ART_KNIFE_ENCH: While you are at full HP, gain [blue]4[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Your Skill cards deal extra damage equal to half your [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] stacks.
Magic likes a precise edge too.
Your Attack cards deal [blue]2[/blue] extra damage and apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] after dealing damage.
Line up the center. Let the rest follow.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_EAGLE_EYE_SCOP: When your Attack cards deal damage, first apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to the target. That hit then deals extra damage equal to the target's [gold]Mark[/gold] stacks × [blue]2[/blue].
You do not just see the target. You see the impact.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_TARGET_BOARD.d:
Your Attack cards deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage.
At the start of each turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_GIANT_ANCHOR.d: Whenever you take unblocked damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Giant Anchor[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_GIANT_ANCHOR.f: Heavy enough to drag you down. Heavy enough to hold you still.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_BOXING_GLOVE_G:
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Vigor[/power].
This relic also grants the [gold]Boxing Gloves Set[/gold] effect.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_BOXING_GLOVE:
At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red]. At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Vigor[/power].
This relic also grants the [gold]Boxing Gloves Set[/gold] effect.
A better fit makes every punch land cleaner.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_BOXING_GLOVE_P:
At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [red]Strength[/red]. At the start of each turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] [power]Vigor[/power].
This relic also grants the [gold]Boxing Gloves Set[/gold] effect.
If the gloves look this good, the damage should too.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_SPEED_ROLLER_G: Start a little faster than the fight expects.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_SPEED_ROLLER: A cleaner rhythm turns into cleaner movement.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_SPEED_ROLLER_P: The premium version starts moving before anyone else does.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_PURPLE_BIG_BACKPACK: At combat start, your Max Energy is increased by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Cooldown-type Persona relics have their cooldown cap reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
[relic]Bionic Jasmine[/relic]'s step conversion requirement is reduced by [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]4[/blue].
One more bar of charge. One less turn of waiting.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_ELEGANT_FEATHE: Whenever damage you take is fully blocked, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Elegant Feather[/gold], up to [blue]3[/blue].
Grace under pressure turns into force on the return.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_ATM.title: ATM
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_ATM.descriptio: Whenever you cause another player to gain [gold]StarLight[/gold], that target gains [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]StarLight[/gold], and you gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_ATM.flavor: Send one out. Hear one back.
Whenever you play a card that costs at least [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
If your HP is full, spend [blue]4[/blue] stacks of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
A little sugar. A little sustain.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_VITAMIN.title: Vitamin
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_VITAMIN.descri: Whenever you draw [blue]1[/blue] card, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold]. This can trigger at most [blue]9[/blue] times each turn.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_VITAMIN.flavor: A steady supplement for a longer fight.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_MARK_SPRAY_CAN: After your Skill cards deal damage to an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to that target.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_MAGIC_QUIVER.d: Once each turn, when a Skill card deals damage to a monster that already has [gold]Mark[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] more [gold]Mark[/gold] and return a copy of that Skill card to your hand.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_NINJA_SHURIKEN:
At combat start, your Max Energy is increased by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Whenever your Skill cards deal damage to an enemy, that target takes extra damage equal to its [gold]Mark[/gold] stacks.
Marks are for finishing, not for decoration.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_BLUE_HANDHELD_FAN_S: After you play a Persona Skill card, apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-TOKEN_GOLD_HANDHELD_FAN_L: After you play a Persona Skill card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
A bigger gust keeps the turn moving.
